dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal translated as context-dependent with separate long and short entry/exit conditions. Long entries: open above pivot, pullback confirmed by close above pivot and above S1 support. Short entries: open below pivot, pullback confirmed by close below pivot and below R1 resistance. Exits target R2/S2 as primary profit targets. Stop-loss and holding period not specified by author; backtest engine should apply defaults. Conditions use pivot point levels (pivot, r1, r2, s1, s2) as core decision variables per signal specification.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal translated as context-dependent with separate long and short entry/exit conditions. Long entries: open above pivot, pullback confirmed by close above pivot and above S1 support. Short entries: open below pivot, pullback confirmed by close below pivot and below R1 resistance. Exits target R2/S2 as primary profit targets. Stop-loss and holding period not specified by author; backtest engine should apply defaults. Conditions use pivot point levels (pivot, r1, r2, s1, s2) as core decision variables per signal specification.

source_rule_text: On an up-open above pivot or R1, buy pullbacks to the pivot or R1 for uptrend continuation to R2/R3+; on a down-open below pivot or S1, sell pullbacks to the pivot or S1 for downtrend continuation to S2/S3 or lower.
